name: Isovalent
description: Isovalent — Enterprise Cilium vendor providing eBPF-based networking, security, and observability for Kubernetes.

seo.title: Isovalent — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Isovalent: Isovalent — Enterprise Cilium vendor providing eBPF-based networking, security, and observability for Kubernetes.

when_to_use: eBPF-based Kubernetes networking and observability with Cilium
Zero-trust network policies for pod-to-pod traffic in K8s
Network security and microsegmentation without sidecars
Advanced Hubble visibility into Kubernetes network flows
Replacing iptables-based networking with high-performance eBPF

pros: Deep eBPF expertise from Cilium creators
cons: eBPF debugging has steep learning curve
review.verdict: The gold standard for eBPF Kubernetes networking, but only justified at serious enterprise scale.
review.best_for: Large enterprises running multi-cluster Kubernetes needing deep network security and observability
review.not_for: Small teams, single-cluster setups, or shops without dedicated platform engineers
